claim: Hydra can be used as a synchronous settlement layer over Cardano-style eUTXO state.

supporting_evidence.quote: Hydra can be used as a synchronous settlement layer over Cardano-style eUTXO state

claim: A Hydra Head moves through four phases: Init, Open, Close, and Fanout.

supporting_evidence.quote: A Hydra Head moves through four phases: Init, Open, Close, and Fanout

claim: Hydra Heads in the small (3-participant) configuration reach 1,000 TPS with sub-1s finality, versus 250 TPS and ~20s finality for the baseline L1.
Hydra Head safety relies on unanimity plus a contestation period during Close, not honest-majority assumptions.

supporting_evidence.quote: safety relies on unanimity and a contestation period during Close

claim: It is an open question how Hydra Heads compose with delegated-signing standards like the Open Wallet Standard (OWS) when an autonomous agent holds one of the Head's signing keys.

supporting_evidence.quote: how Hydra Heads compose with external delegated-signing standards such as the Open Wallet Standard (OWS)
